name: temporal_supersession
description: Contradicting facts — newer should supersede older in retrieval

exchanges.user_message: We currently have 3 developers on the team.
exchanges.assistant_response: Three developers — that is lean for a product company. Are they all full-time?

exchanges.user_message: Actually we just hired 4 more. We now have 7 developers total.
exchanges.assistant_response: From 3 to 7 is a significant scale-up. That changes your capacity picture entirely.

assertions.query: how many developers on the team

assertions.description: Old state (3 developers) should not dominate results
